# SportixTV — Live Sports & TV Streaming

> SportixTV (sportixtv.online) is a free live sports and TV streaming platform. Watch cricket, football, basketball, tennis, news, entertainment, and more — all in HD, no registration required.

## What is SportixTV?

SportixTV is a free online streaming directory that aggregates publicly available live TV channels and sports events. Users can watch live matches and TV channels from any device — mobile, tablet, desktop, or smart TV — without signup or subscription.

## Content Available

- **Live Sports**: Cricket (IPL, PSL, international), Football (Premier League, La Liga, UEFA Champions League), Basketball (NBA), Tennis, Boxing, MMA, Formula 1, Rugby
- **Live TV Channels**: News, entertainment, movies, kids' channels, music channels
- **Sports Events**: Live match schedules with team vs team match listings
- **Categories**: Sports, News, Entertainment, Movies, Kids, Music, Regional

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://sportixtv.online — Browse all live channels and events
- Categories: https://sportixtv.online/categories — All channel categories
- Events: https://sportixtv.online/events — Live and upcoming sports matches
- About: https://sportixtv.online/about — About SportixTV
- Contact: https://sportixtv.online/contact — Contact us

## Structured Data

SportixTV uses Schema.org structured data including:
- WebSite with SearchAction (sitelinks search box)
- Organization with logo and social links
- BroadcastService and VideoObject for channels
- SportsEvent with team competitors for matches
- BreadcrumbList on all pages
- FAQPage on homepage
- ItemList on category and events pages

## Technical

- Platform: Next.js (App Router)
- Streaming: HLS (m3u8) and iframe embeds
- Performance: Server-side rendered, PWA-enabled
- Mobile: Fully responsive

## Disclaimer

SportixTV does not host any media content. All streams are provided by third-party sources publicly available on the internet. For content removal, see: https://sportixtv.online/dmca

## Contact

For inquiries, visit: https://sportixtv.online/contact
